comments.body:
### Triage
- **Scope:** "All Portal Logins" page data/column behavior, not the setup workflow itself.
- **Concrete data:** the table columns live in a single component and the member route always renders it with `showOrgColumn=false`; prior issue GEN-2018 fixed the nearby `View all portal logins` navigation path, so this looks adjacent to a known page area.
- **Start here:** `apps/web-app/src/components/credentials/credentials-table.tsx`, `apps/web-app/src/app/(location)/(member)/credentials/all/page.tsx`, and `apps/web-app/src/components/credentials/portal-status-list.tsx`.
- **Follow-up path:** linked historical issue **GEN-2018** is the closest prior fix in this area; use **GEN-2849** for any new work if the behavior differs from that older navigation bug.
